_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: We observed that 844 to 848 mutants are highly ubiquitylated compared to wild-type neurofibromin and coimmunoprecipitate with increased amounts of HSP70
details: Successfully detected increased HSP70 coimmunoprecipitation with 844-848 mutants compared to wild-type neurofibromin, indicating protein misfolding response
